title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Oily Hair
description: Aloe barbadensis essential oils contains properties like salicylic acid and aloin, which help control oil production in the scalp. These constituents work by reducing inflammation and promoting a healthy scalp environment, making it less likely for oil glands to overproduce sebum.  To use Aloe barbadensis essential oils for oily hair, mix a few drops with a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil and apply it to your scalp.
